mapper.sql:
a.id AS "id", a.uid AS "uid", a.uid2 AS "uid2.id", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate",
uid2.nickname AS "uid2.nickname", uid2.icon AS "uid2.icon", uid2.sex AS "uid2.sex"
LEFT JOIN t_member uid2 ON uid2.id = a.uid2
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_black( id, uid, uid2, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{uid}, #{uid2.id}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
